content:
# Super Resolution

**Summary**: An image processing technique that enhances the resolution of an image by recovering high-frequency details.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] applied super-resolution to improve the quality of micropaleontological images.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Super-resolution addresses issues with low-resolution, downsampled images in micropaleontology.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Using SwinIR and GAN architectures.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The ForamViT-GAN integrates vision transformers and GANs for both synthesis and super-resolution of micropaleontological images. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 12]])
